parameters.query: SELECT * FROM chief_complaint WHERE patient_id = $1::uuid AND is_current = true LIMIT 1

UPDATE chief_complaint SET is_current = false WHERE patient_id = $1::uuid AND is_current = true;
INSERT INTO chief_complaint (patient_id, complaint_text, symptom_duration, symptom_onset, is_current)
VALUES ($1::uuid, $2, $3, $4, true)
RETURNING *
